label: Transparent Philodendron motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single philodendron leaf, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one glossy heart-shaped philodendron leaf, accurate rainforest-floor plant form, rich gloss green surface, pronounced lime green veins radiating from the stem notch, subtle darker rainforest shadow along folds and underside, short clean petiole visible, opaque botanical cutout edges.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, polished photographic-realistic finish, crisp edge definition, natural leaf texture and waxy highlights.
Composition/framing: centered complete leaf with generous padding on all sides; show the entire leaf and short petiole; do not crop the subject; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves glossy green color, lime vein detail, and dark rainforest shadow depth; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Color palette: gloss green philodendron leaf, lime veins, rainforest shadow only; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: the background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second leaf, no flower, no pot, no hand, no droplets, no decorative background, no extra colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input images: the visible transparent philodendron motif.png is the source reference for colors, shape, texture, gloss, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Philodendron" derived from the glossy heart-shaped philodendron leaf.
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160, 16:9, polished high-resolution source board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: polished workspace system for calm operational tools, precise grid, clean productivity UI, dense but breathable, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors from the leaf: glossy deep philodendron green, medium leaf green, lime vein highlights, pale waxy green reflections, rainforest shadow green-black, misty leaf-neutral surfaces. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, beige-dominant styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: premium design board with left palette/token rail, central component examples, right navigation dashboard/table/search/status modules, and a bottom row for texture, 8px radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance with headings, body, captions, numerals, and short examples: "フィロデンドロン", "作業状態", "検索", "完了".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Dashboard/data: workspace metrics, task status, activity timeline, small bar chart, line chart, compact data table, status chips, and summary cards using the motif palette only.
Forms/tables/search: polished product controls with visible focus rings, lime-vein accent states, rainforest-shadow text, readable labels, consistent spacing.
Texture/materials: subtle glossy leaf vein lines, waxy highlight bands, rainforest-floor shadow separators, polished workspace surfaces, quiet tactile grain.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark, no random brand names.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: the visible philodendron motif.png and the visible Morphous Philodendron light board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Philodendron" with the same polished workspace system identity, coverage, and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160, 16:9, polished high-resolution source board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: polished workspace system for calm operational tools in dark mode, rainforest-floor depth, precise grid, dense but breathable, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors from the leaf: rainforest shadow green-black backgrounds, deep glossy leaf panels, medium leaf green controls, lime vein focus and chart accents, pale waxy green text highlights, muted misty green borders. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, neon, generic purple or blue gradients, flat pure black, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: premium dark design board with left palette/token rail, central component examples, right navigation dashboard/table/search/status modules, and a bottom row for texture, 8px radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance with headings, body, captions, numerals, and short examples: "フィロデンドロン", "作業状態", "検索", "完了".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Dashboard/data: workspace metrics, task status, activity timeline, small bar chart, line chart, compact data table, status chips, and summary cards using the motif palette only.
Forms/tables/search: polished dark product controls with visible lime focus rings, rainforest-shadow surfaces, readable labels, consistent spacing.
Texture/materials: subtle glossy leaf vein lines, waxy highlight bands, rainforest-floor shadow separators, polished workspace surfaces, quiet tactile grain.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark, no random brand names.
